nasb.text: For the Lord your God is a compassionate God; He will not fail you nor destroy you nor forget the covenant with your fathers which He swore to them.

esv.text: For the Lord your God is a merciful God. He will not leave you or destroy you or forget the covenant with your fathers that he swore to them.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華你的　神原是滿有憐憫的　神，他必不丟棄你，不毀滅你，也不忘記他起誓與你的列祖所立的約。

ccb.text: 因为你们的上帝耶和华充满怜悯，祂不会抛弃你们，灭绝你们，也不会忘记祂与你们祖先所立的誓约。
